title: HuaFont 平滑字体
description: Make Minecraft fonts smooth and high-definition.With HUAWEI HarmonySansSC.
body:
Certainly! Here's the English translation of your resource pack description, maintaining a clean and professional tone while highlighting the key features:

---

### Smooth HD Font Resource Pack

Tired of Minecraft’s overly pixelated default font? Give the **Smooth HD Font** resource pack a try!

This pack replaces all in-game text—including menus, chat messages, item names, signs, and more—with a meticulously crafted high-definition font. Using anti-aliasing and smooth rendering techniques, it significantly improves readability and visual comfort while perfectly preserving the original vanilla style and UI layout.

✨ **Features**:  
- 100% HD remaster, optimized for multiple resolutions  
- Maintains original character width and spacing for full compatibility with all mods and data packs  
- Non-intrusive—only replaces font textures, with zero impact on performance  
- Supports Simplified Chinese, English, and other commonly used languages  

Make every word a pleasure to read—**Smooth HD Font** adds a touch of clarity and refinement to your blocky world.

> Compatible with Minecraft Java Edition 1.20+
